name: KILLIAN-JAMIESON DIVERTICULUM
definition: rare pulsion diverticulum through muscular gap in anterolateral wall of proximal cervical

demographics.Age: usually > 60 years (same as for Zenker diverticulum)

dominant_finding: predominantly left lateral + anterior outpouching from cervical esophagus
distribution: predominantly left lateral + anterior outpouching from cervical esophagus
discriminating_features: predominantly left lateral + anterior outpouching from cervical esophagus

general: predominantly left lateral + anterior outpouching from cervical esophagus
